title: Britain Summons Iran’s Ambassador Over Message to Iranians in U.K.
summary_full: Iran’s embassy in London posted a message on social media inviting Iranians living in Britain to register for a ‘Sacrifice for the Homeland’ campaign.
summary_public: Iran’s embassy in London posted a message on social media inviting Iranians living in Britain to register for a ‘Sacrifice for the Homeland’ campaign.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Summons Iran’s Ambassador Over Message to Iranians in U.K.
